videoSnippet.title: Navigating the Minefield || Gukesh vs Arjun Erigaisi || Chennai Grand Masters 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Gukesh D (2717) - Erigaisi Arjun (2757)
Quantbox Chennai Grand Masters 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.07.19
D31 Queen's Gambit Declined, Charousek (Petrosian) variation

1.c4 e6 2.Nc3 d5 3.d4 Be7 4.cxd5 exd5 5.Bf4 c6 6.e3 Bf5 7.g4 Be6 8.h4 Nd7 9.Nh3 Qb6 10.Rb1 Bxh4 11.g5 Ne7 12.Ng1 Ng6 13.Nf3 Bg4 14.Bh3 h5 15.Bxg4 hxg4 16.Nxh4 Rxh4 17.Rxh4 Nxh4 18.Qxg4 Ng6 19.Bg3 Ndf8 20.Kf1 Ne7 21.Kg2 Ne6 22.Ne2 g6 23.Rh1 Qxb2 24.Rh8+ Nf8 25.Bd6 Rd8 26.Bc7 Rc8 27.Bd6 Rd8 28.Bc7 Rc8 29.Be5 Nf5 30.Bg7 Ke7 31.Bf6+ Kd6 32.Be5+ Ke7 33.Bf6+ Kd6 34.Bg7 Ke7 35.e4 Nxg7 36.Qxc8 Nge6 37.Ng3 Qxd4 38.Qxb7+ Nd7 39.Rh4 Qa4 40.Qb2 d4 41.f4 d3 42.Qd2 Ndc5 43.f5 gxf5 44.Nxf5+ Kd7 45.Ne3 Nxg5 46.Qf2 Ncxe4 47.Qb2 Ke6 48.Rf4 c5 49.a3 Qc6 50.Qb3+ c4 51.Qxc4+ Qxc4 52.Nxc4 Kd5 53.Nb2 d2 54.Rf5+ Kd4 55.Ra5 Kc3 56.Nd1+ Kc2 57.Ne3+ Kd3 58.Nd1 Ke2 59.Nb2 Nf3 60.Kh3 Ne1 61.Rd5 Nf2+ 62.Kh2 Ned3 63.Na4 Ne4
